---
title: "Manuscript Figures"
author: "Art Tay"
format:
  pdf:
     documentclass: article
     papersize: letter
     geometry:
         margin=1in
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# knitr options.
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
# knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = )

# Libraries.
library(tidyverse)
# library(tidymodels)
library(kableExtra)

# tidymodels_prefer()

library(INLA)
library(Matrix)

library(SpaNorm)
library(SpatialExperiment)

# load sample data
data(HumanDLPFC)
# change gene IDs to gene names
rownames(HumanDLPFC) = rowData(HumanDLPFC)$gene_name
```

```{r}
#| label: Meta Data

method_order <- c(
  "GPSNorm", 
  "none",
  "q3",
  "ls",
  "scran",
  "sct",
  "Giotto",
  "SpaNorm"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: Load GPSNorm

devtools::load_all(".")
library(GPSNorm)
```

This notebook documents the code used to generate each figure present in the manuscript. 

# Figure 1 

```{r}
#| label: Figure 1 code

set.seed(1)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Build simple 1D chain adjacency (Besag graph)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

build_chain_graph <- function(n) {
    i <- c(1:(n - 1), 2:n)
    j <- c(2:n, 1:(n - 1))
    A <- sparseMatrix(i = i, j = j, x = 1, dims = c(n, n))
    A <- A + t(A)
    A
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Simulate spatial Poisson data
#    Note: at spatial_sd = 0, u = 0 exactly (stable baseline).
# ------------------------------------------------------------

simulate_spatial_data <- function(n = 30,
                                  beta = 0,
                                  spatial_sd = 0.5,
                                  alpha = 3) {

    AOI_ID <- 1:n
    x_coord <- seq(0, 1, length.out = n)

    diff <- ifelse(x_coord > 0.5, 1, 0)

    if (spatial_sd <= 0) {
        u <- rep(0, n)
    } else {
        u <- cumsum(rnorm(n, mean = 0, sd = spatial_sd / sqrt(n)))
        u <- as.numeric(scale(u)) * spatial_sd
    }

    eta <- alpha + beta * diff + u
    mu <- exp(eta)

    y <- rpois(n, mu)

    list(
        df = data.frame(
            y = y,
            AOI_ID = AOI_ID,
            diff = diff
        ),
        graph = build_chain_graph(n)
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Fit joint model
# ------------------------------------------------------------

fit_joint <- function(dat) {

    formula <- y ~ 1 + diff +
        f(
            AOI_ID,
            model = "besag",
            graph = dat$graph,
            scale.model = TRUE
        )

    inla(
        formula,
        data = dat$df,
        family = "poisson",
        control.predictor = list(compute = TRUE, link = 1),
        control.compute = list(dic = FALSE, waic = FALSE, cpo = FALSE)
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Plug-in normalization (two-stage)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

fit_plugin <- function(dat) {

    formula_spatial <- y ~ 1 +
        f(
            AOI_ID,
            model = "besag",
            graph = dat$graph,
            scale.model = TRUE
        )

    fit_spatial <- inla(
        formula_spatial,
        data = dat$df,
        family = "poisson",
        control.predictor = list(compute = TRUE, link = 1),
        control.compute = list(dic = FALSE, waic = FALSE, cpo = FALSE)
    )

    u_hat <- fit_spatial$summary.random$AOI_ID$mean

    df2 <- dat$df
    df2$offset_corr <- -u_hat

    formula_de <- y ~ 1 + diff + offset(offset_corr)

    inla(
        formula_de,
        data = df2,
        family = "poisson",
        control.predictor = list(compute = TRUE, link = 1),
        control.compute = list(dic = FALSE, waic = FALSE, cpo = FALSE)
    )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Run simulation across spatial strengths (replicate-level)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

spatial_grid <- seq(0, 1.5, length.out = 8)
n_rep <- 100

message("Starting simulation: ",
        "grid = ", length(spatial_grid),
        ", reps per grid = ", n_rep,
        ", total fits = ", length(spatial_grid) * n_rep * 2)

all_res <- vector("list", length(spatial_grid) * n_rep)
k <- 1L

for (g in seq_along(spatial_grid)) {

    s <- spatial_grid[g]
    message(sprintf("Grid %d / %d: spatial_sd = %.3f",
                    g, length(spatial_grid), s))

    for (r in 1:n_rep) {

        if (r %% 5 == 0 || r == 1) {
            message(sprintf("  rep %d / %d", r, n_rep))
        }

        dat <- simulate_spatial_data(
            beta = 0,
            spatial_sd = s
        )

        fitJ <- fit_joint(dat)
        fitP <- fit_plugin(dat)

        betaJ <- fitJ$summary.fixed["diff", "mean"]
        sdJ <- fitJ$summary.fixed["diff", "sd"]

        betaP <- fitP$summary.fixed["diff", "mean"]
        sdP <- fitP$summary.fixed["diff", "sd"]

        widthJ <- 2 * 1.96 * sdJ
        widthP <- 2 * 1.96 * sdP

        coverJ <- abs(betaJ - 0) <= 1.96 * sdJ
        coverP <- abs(betaP - 0) <= 1.96 * sdP

        all_res[[k]] <- data.frame(
            spatial_sd = s,
            width_joint = widthJ,
            width_plugin = widthP,
            cover_joint = coverJ,
            cover_plugin = coverP
        )
        k <- k + 1L
    }
}

res <- bind_rows(all_res)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Summaries + MC SEs for error bars
# ------------------------------------------------------------

sum_res <- res %>%
    group_by(spatial_sd) %>%
    summarise(
        width_joint = mean(width_joint),
        width_plugin = mean(width_plugin),
        se_width_joint = sd(width_joint) / sqrt(n()),
        se_width_plugin = sd(width_plugin) / sqrt(n()),
        cover_joint = mean(cover_joint),
        cover_plugin = mean(cover_plugin),
        se_cover_joint =
            sqrt(cover_joint * (1 - cover_joint) / n()),
        se_cover_plugin =
            sqrt(cover_plugin * (1 - cover_plugin) / n()),
        .groups = "drop"
    )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Plot CI width with error bars (mean +/- 1 SE)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

width_long <- sum_res %>%
    transmute(
        spatial_sd = spatial_sd,
        Joint = width_joint,
        Plug_in = width_plugin,
        se_Joint = se_width_joint,
        se_Plug_in = se_width_plugin
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(
        cols = c(Joint, Plug_in),
        names_to = "method",
        values_to = "width"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        se = ifelse(method == "Joint", se_Joint, se_Plug_in),
        ymin = width - se,
        ymax = width + se
    )

p1 <- ggplot(width_long, aes(spatial_sd, width, color = method)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), width = 0.05) +
    labs(
        x = "Spatial SD",
        y = "Average 95% CI width (beta)",
        color = "",
        title = "Joint Bayesian vs Plug-in DE Uncertainty"
    ) +
    theme_bw()

print(p1)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 8. Plot coverage with error bars (mean +/- 1 SE)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

cover_long <- sum_res %>%
    transmute(
        spatial_sd = spatial_sd,
        Joint = cover_joint,
        Plug_in = cover_plugin,
        se_Joint = se_cover_joint,
        se_Plug_in = se_cover_plugin
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(
        cols = c(Joint, Plug_in),
        names_to = "method",
        values_to = "cover"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
        se = ifelse(method == "Joint", se_Joint, se_Plug_in),
        ymin = pmax(0, cover - se),
        ymax = pmin(1, cover + se)
    )

p2 <- ggplot(cover_long, aes(spatial_sd, cover, color = method)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), width = 0.05) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.95, linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(
        x = "Spatial SD",
        y = "Empirical 95% coverage",
        color = "",
        title = "Coverage of beta under Spatial Confounding"
    ) +
    theme_bw()

print(p2)
```

# Figure 2 

```{r}
#| label: Figure 2 code 

sim_1 <- GPSNorm::simulate_spe_benchmark(
    HumanDLPFC, 
    domain_col = "AnnotatedCluster",
    de_prop = 0.1,
    dom_prop = 0.20,
    dom_sd = 1.5, 
    svg_prop = 0.20,
    svg_sd = 1.5, 
    de_svg_overlap = 0.7, 
    de_dom_overlap = 0.7, 
    tech_spatial_sd = 1.6,
    slide_lib_sd = 1.2,
    zi_prob = 0,
    spot_prop = 0.05,
    gene_prop = 0.05,
    seed = 1
)

sim_1_INLA <- GPSNorm::normalize_spe_inla_pac(
    sim_1$spe, 
    model_fun = GPSNorm::fit_inla_baseline_model,
    model_args = list(
        verbose = TRUE
    )
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Build spatial correction (within-slide centered)
# ------------------------------------------------------------

df_plot <- sim_1$truth_spot |> as.data.frame() |> 
    mutate(est = unique(sim_1_INLA$fit$latent$spatial_eff)) |> 
    group_by(Slide_ID) |>
    mutate(
        logL_ctr = log_L_all - mean(log_L_all),
        est_ctr  = est - mean(est),
        correction = logL_ctr + est_ctr
    ) |>
    ungroup()

# Global correlation for annotation
corr_val <- cor(df_plot$correction,
                df_plot$tech_exposure_ctr)

# Shared color limits (IMPORTANT for visual comparison)
lims <- range(
    c(df_plot$tech_exposure_ctr, df_plot$correction),
    finite = TRUE
)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Panel A — True technical field
# ------------------------------------------------------------

true_field <- df_plot |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, color = tech_exposure_ctr)) +
        geom_point(size = 1.5) +
        facet_wrap(~ Slide_ID) +
        scale_color_viridis_c(limits = lims) +
        coord_equal() +
    labs(
        title = "True Technical Spatial Field",
        color = "Expression Level"
    ) +
    theme_bw() + 
    theme(
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_blank(),
    ) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank())

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Panel B — Model correction
# ------------------------------------------------------------

est_field <- df_plot |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = x, y = y, color = correction)) +
        geom_point(size = 1.5) +
        facet_wrap(~ Slide_ID) +
        scale_color_viridis_c(limits = lims) +
        coord_equal() +
        labs(
            title = "Estimated Spatial Correction",
            color = "Expression Level"
        ) +
        theme_bw() + 
        theme(
            axis.title = element_blank(),
            axis.text = element_blank()
        ) +
        theme(panel.grid = element_blank())
```

# Figures 3 - 5

```{r}
#| label: Plotting helper function 

plot_metric_summary <- function(
    res_raw,
    metric,
    higher_is_better = TRUE,
    highlight_winner = TRUE,
    title = NULL,
    show_error = FALSE,
    order = NULL
) {

    stopifnot(metric %in% colnames(res_raw))

    # ----------------------------
    # Aggregate over replicates
    # ----------------------------
    summary_tbl <- res_raw |>
        dplyr::group_by(scenario, method) |>
        dplyr::summarise(
        mean = mean(.data[[metric]], na.rm = TRUE),
        sd   = sd(.data[[metric]], na.rm = TRUE),
        n    = sum(!is.na(.data[[metric]])),
        .groups = "drop"
        ) |>
        dplyr::mutate(se = sd / sqrt(pmax(n, 1)))

    # ----------------------------
    # Identify winner per scenario
    # ----------------------------
    if (highlight_winner) {
        summary_tbl <- summary_tbl |>
        dplyr::group_by(scenario) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
            is_winner = if (higher_is_better) {
            mean >= max(mean, na.rm = TRUE) - 1e-8
            } else {
            mean <= min(mean, na.rm = TRUE) + 1e-8
            }
        ) |>
        dplyr::ungroup()
    } else {
        summary_tbl$is_winner <- FALSE
    }

    # ----------------------------
    # Plot
    # ----------------------------
    p <- ggplot(
        summary_tbl,
        aes(
        x = reorder(method, mean),
        y = mean,
        fill = is_winner
        )
    ) +
        geom_col(
            color = "black",
            linewidth = 0.25
        ) +
        facet_wrap(~ scenario, scales = "free_y") +
        scale_fill_manual(
            values = c(
                "TRUE"  = "#D55E00",  # colorblind-safe orange
                "FALSE" = "grey70"
            ),
            guide = "none"
        ) +
        labs(
            title = title %||% paste("Mean", metric, "by method"),
            x = "Method",
            y = paste("Mean", metric)
        ) +
        theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
        theme(
            strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
            panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
        )

    # ----------------------------
    # Optional error bars
    # ----------------------------
    if (show_error) {
        p <- p +
        geom_errorbar(
            aes(ymin = mean - se, ymax = mean + se),
            width = 0.3,
            linewidth = 0.3
        )
    }

    if (!is.null(order)) {
        p <- p + scale_x_discrete(
            limits = order, guide = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)
        )
    }

    return(p)
}
```


```{r}
#| label: Run and load simulation script results

# Run `Rscript scripts/run_simulation.R`

# Run `Rscript scripts/ren_de_eval.R` 

de_results <- read.csv("./simulations_4/results/de_results.csv")
```

```{r}
#| label: Figure 3 code

de_bias_plot <- de_results 

de_bias_plot <- de_bias_plot |> 
    filter(!(engine == "limma" & method == "inla")) |> 
    filter(method != "inla_mix") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_mix") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_heavy") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_tuned") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_bin") |> 
    filter(scenario != "G_conf_strong") |> 
    mutate(method = ifelse(method == "inla", "GPSNorm", method)) |> 
    mutate(method = ifelse(method == "giotto", "Giotto", method)) |> 
    mutate(method = ifelse(method == "spanorm", "SpaNorm", method)) |> 
    group_by(scenario, method) |>
    summarise(
        RMSE = mean(sqrt(mse), na.rm = TRUE), 
        bias = mean(bias, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    mutate(method = factor(method, levels = method_order))

de_bias_plot <- de_bias_plot |> 
    ggplot(aes(
        x = bias, y = RMSE, color = method
    )) + 
        geom_point(size = 3) + 
        facet_wrap(~ scenario) + 
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") + 
        labs(
            x = "Bias (mean logFC error)", 
            y = "RMSE"
        ) + 
        theme_bw()

de_bias_plot
```


```{r}
#| label: Figure 4 code

de_rmse_plot <- de_results

de_rmse_plot <- de_rmse_plot |>  
    filter(!(engine == "limma" & method == "inla")) |> 
    filter(method != "inla_mix") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_mix") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_heavy") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_tuned") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_bin") |> 
    filter(scenario != "G_conf_strong") |> 
    mutate(method = ifelse(method == "inla", "GPSNorm", method)) |> 
    mutate(method = ifelse(method == "giotto", "Giotto", method)) |> 
    mutate(method = ifelse(method == "spanorm", "SpaNorm", method)) |> 
    mutate(RMSE = sqrt(mse))

de_rmse_plot <- plot_metric_summary(
    de_rmse_plot, 
    metric = "RMSE", 
    higher_is_better = FALSE,
    show_error = TRUE,
    title = "",
    order = method_order
)

de_rmse_plot
```

```{r}
#| label: Figure 5 code

de_auc_plot <- de_results

de_auc_plot <- de_auc_plot |>  
    filter(!(engine == "limma" & method == "inla")) |> 
    filter(method != "inla_mix") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_mix") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_heavy") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_tuned") |> 
    filter(method != "inla_bin") |> 
    filter(scenario != "G_conf_strong") |> 
    mutate(method = ifelse(method == "inla", "GPSNorm", method)) |> 
    mutate(method = ifelse(method == "giotto", "Giotto", method)) |> 
    mutate(method = ifelse(method == "spanorm", "SpaNorm", method))

de_auc_plot <- plot_metric_summary(
    de_auc_plot, 
    metric = "auc", 
    higher_is_better = TRUE,
    show_error = TRUE,
    title = "",
    order = method_order
)

de_auc_plot +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.5, 1.0)) +
    scale_y_continuous(
        breaks = seq(0.5, 1.0, by = 0.15)
    )
```

# Figure 6

```{r}
#| label: Figure 6 code

# (C) Upper Left 

logcounts(HumanDLPFC) = log2(counts(HumanDLPFC) + 1)

p_counts = plotSpatial(
    HumanDLPFC,
    colour = MOBP,
    what = "expression",
    assay = "logcounts",
    size = 1
  ) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(option = "F") +
  ggtitle("logCounts")

p_counts

# (C) Upper Right

set.seed(36)
spaNorm_spe <- SpaNorm(HumanDLPFC)

p_logpac = plotSpatial(
    spaNorm_spe, 
    colour = MOBP,
    what = "expression",
    assay = "logcounts",
    size = 1
  ) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(option = "F") +
  ggtitle("logPAC")

p_logpac

# Change domain to binary. 
colData(HumanDLPFC)$WM <-
  as.integer(colData(HumanDLPFC)$AnnotatedCluster == "WM")

# Round trip format
data_human <- GPSNorm::spe_to_geomx_long(
    HumanDLPFC, 
    assay = "counts", 
    group_col = "WM"
)

data_human <- GPSNorm::geomx_long_to_spe(
    data_human,
    count_col = "Count_int",
    aoi_col = "AOI_ID",
    gene_col = "Gene_ID",
    gene_name_col = "TargetName",
    gene_type_col = "CodeClass_clean",
    slide_col = "sample_id",
    group_col = "WM",
    coord_cols = c("ROICoordinateX", "ROICoordinateY")
)

# (C) Lower Left 

set.seed(36)

GPSNorm_spe <- GPSNorm::normalize_spe_inla_pac(
    data_human, 
    model_fun = GPSNorm::fit_inla_baseline_model,
    model_args = list(
        verbose = TRUE
    ), 
    cluster_aoi = TRUE, 
    cluster_args = list(
        k = 40, 
        target_per_slide = 500L, 
        verbose = TRUE
    ), 
    group_col = "WM_bin"
)

p_gps = plotSpatial(
    GPSNorm_spe$spe, 
    colour = MOBP,
    what = "expression",
    assay = "logcounts",
    size = 1
  ) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(option = "F") +
  ggtitle("logPAC")

p_gps

# (C) Lower Right

GPSNorm_spe_adj <- GPSNorm::adjust_counts(
    GPSNorm_spe, 
    method = "postmedian", 
    assay_out = "adjusted"
)

p_gps_post_med = plotSpatial(
    GPSNorm_spe_adj, 
    colour = MOBP,
    what = "expression",
    assay = "adjusted",
    size = 1
  ) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c(option = "F") +
  ggtitle("logPAC")

p_gps_post_med
```

# Figure 7

```{r}
#| label: Figure 7 code 

# Load and format data. 
data_covid <- GPSNorm::load_geomx_for_inla(
    "/GPSNorm/analysis/data/crossSpatialTranscriptomicCharacterization_data/GSE186213_Post_Biological_Probe_QC.xlsx",
    seg_covariates = c(
        "AOISurfaceArea",
        "AOINucleiCount",
        "DeduplicatedReads",
        "SequencingSaturation", 
        "AlignedReads", 
        "Mix"
    )
)

data_covid_spe <- GPSNorm::geomx_long_to_spe(
    data_covid, group_col = "Mix",
    extra_coldata = c(
        "AOISurfaceArea",
        "AOINucleiCount",
        "DeduplicatedReads",
        "SequencingSaturation", 
        "Slide_ID"
    )
)

# GSPNorm Volcano
covid_fit <- GPSNorm::normalize_spe_inla_pac(
    data_covid_spe, 
    model_fun = GPSNorm::fit_inla_baseline_model,
    model_args = list(
        verbose = TRUE
    ), 
    group_col = "Mix_bin"
)

covid_fit_bayes <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_bayes(
    covid_fit$spe, 
    covid_fit$fit$fit
)

# Competing Normalizations 

covid_none <- data_covid_spe
logcounts(covid_none) <- log2(counts(data_covid_spe) + 1)

covid_q3 <- data_covid_spe
logcounts(covid_q3) <- log2(counts(data_covid_spe) + 1)
covid_q3 <- apply_q3_logcounts(covid_q3)

#covid_SpaNorm <- SpaNorm::SpaNorm(data_covid_spe)

#covid_scran <- normalise_scran(data_covid_spe)

covid_sct <- normalise_sct(data_covid_spe)

covid_Giotto <- normalise_Giotto(data_covid_spe)

covid_ls <- normalise_ls(data_covid_spe)

covid_none_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    covid_none, 
    group_col = "Mix_bin"
)

covid_q3_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    covid_q3, 
    group_col = "Mix_bin"
)

# covid_SpaNorm_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
#     covid_SpaNorm,
#     group_col = "Mix_bin"
# )

# covid_scran_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
#     covid_scran,
#     group_col = "Mix_bin"
# )

covid_sct_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    covid_sct,
    group_col = "Mix_bin"
)

covid_Giotto_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    covid_Giotto,
    group_col = "Mix_bin"
)

covid_ls_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    covid_ls,
    group_col = "Mix_bin"
)
```

# Figure 8

```{r}
#| label: Figure 8 code 

# Load and format data. 
data_kidney <- GPSNorm::load_geomx_for_inla(
    "/GPSNorm/analysis/data/atlas_human_kidney_data/hu_kidney_count_results/Export3_BiologicalProbeQC.xlsx", 
    seg_covariates = c(
        "AOISurfaceArea",
        "AOINucleiCount",
        "DeduplicatedReads",
        "SequencingSaturation", 
        "AlignedReads", 
        "CD10+",
        "Type"
    )
) |> filter(!is.na(Count))

data_kidney <- data_kidney |> 
    mutate(
        group = ifelse(
            Type %in% c("Cortical glomerulus","Juxtamedullary glomerulus"),
            1, 0
        ) 
    )

data_kidney_spe <- GPSNorm::geomx_long_to_spe(
    data_kidney, group_col = "group",
    extra_coldata = c(
        "AOISurfaceArea",
        "AOINucleiCount",
        "DeduplicatedReads",
        "SequencingSaturation"
    )
)

# Define marker sets. 
glomerulus_markers <- c(
    "NPHS1", "NPHS2", "WT1", "PODXL",
    "PTPRO", "SYNPO", "TRPC6",
    "COL4A3", "COL4A4", "COL4A5",
    "LAMB2"
)

pct_markers <- c(
    "SLC34A1", "LRP2", "CUBN",
    "SLC5A2", "AQP1",
    "SLC22A6", "SLC22A8",
    "ALDOB"
)

kidney_fit <- GPSNorm::normalize_spe_inla_pac(
    data_kidney_spe, 
    model_fun = GPSNorm::fit_inla_baseline_model,
    model_args = list(
        verbose = TRUE
    ),
    group_col = "group_bin"
)

kidney_fit_bayes_score <- (
    kidney_fit_bayes$df |> arrange(gene) |> pull(beta)
)

kidney_none <- data_kidney_spe
logcounts(kidney_none) <- log2(counts(data_kidney_spe) + 1)

kidney_q3 <- data_kidney_spe
logcounts(kidney_q3) <- log2(counts(data_kidney_spe) + 1)
kidney_q3 <- apply_q3_logcounts(kidney_q3)

kidney_SpaNorm <- SpaNorm::SpaNorm(data_kidney_spe, sample.p = 1)

kidney_scran <- normalise_scran(data_kidney_spe)

kidney_sct <- normalise_sct(data_kidney_spe)

kidney_Giotto <- normalise_Giotto(data_kidney_spe)

kidney_ls <- normalise_ls(data_kidney_spe)

kidney_none_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    kidney_none, 
    group_col = "group_bin"
)

kidney_q3_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    kidney_q3, 
    group_col = "group_bin"
)

kidney_SpaNorm_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    kidney_SpaNorm,
    group_col = "group_bin"
)

kidney_scran_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    kidney_scran,
    group_col = "group_bin"
)

kidney_sct_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    kidney_sct,
    group_col = "group_bin"
)

kidney_Giotto_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    kidney_Giotto,
    group_col = "group_bin"
)

kidney_ls_limma <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_limma(
    kidney_ls,
    group_col = "group_bin"
)

res_list <- list(
    GPSNorm  = kidney_fit_bayes$df,
    none  = kidney_none_limma$all,
    q3  = kidney_q3_limma$all,
    SpaNorm  = kidney_SpaNorm_limma$all,
    scran  = kidney_scran_limma$all,
    sct  = kidney_sct_limma$all, 
    Giotto  = kidney_Giotto_limma$all,
    ls  = kidney_ls_limma$all
)

perf_table <- do.call(
    rbind,
    lapply(names(res_list), function(m) {
        compute_dual_marker_performance(
            res_list[[m]],
            positive_markers = glomerulus_markers,
            negative_markers = pct_markers,
            method_name = m
        )
    })
)

evidence_df <- perf_table |>
    select(method,
            pos_mean_evidence_pct,
            neg_mean_evidence_pct
    ) |>
    pivot_longer(
        cols = -method,
        names_to = "marker_type",
        values_to = "value"
    ) |>
    mutate(
        marker_type = recode(
            marker_type,
            pos_mean_evidence_pct = "Glomerulus",
            neg_mean_evidence_pct = "Tubule"
        )
    )

pA <- ggplot(evidence_df,
             aes(x = method,
                 y = value,
                 fill = marker_type)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
            width = 0.6) +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(
        "Glomerulus" = "#009E73",
        "Tubule" = "#D55E00"
        )
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(
        title = "Marker Evidence Ranking",
        y = "Mean Evidence Percentile",
        x = NULL,
        fill = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
    )

pA
```

# Table 2 

Run `Rscript scripts/aoi_cluster_table.R`. 

```{r}
#| label: Table 2 code 

sim_aoi_cluster_table <- read.csv(
    "./simulations_4/results/aoi_cluster_results_top.csv",
    header = TRUE
)

sim_aoi_cluster_table <- sim_aoi_cluster_table |> 
    group_by(Resolution) |> 
    summarise(
        "AOIs" = mean(AOIs), 
        "Runtime (sec)" = mean(Runtime),
        "RMSE" = mean(RMSE_abs),
        "Spearman" = mean(Spearman),
        "Top 10% Spearman" = mean(TopK_Spearman)
    ) |> arrange(desc(AOIs))

sim_aoi_cluster_table |> select(-Resolution) |> 
    kbl(format = "latex", booktabs = T,
        longtable = T, linesep = "", digits = 4)
```

# Table 3 

```{r}
#| label: Table 3 code 

kidney_fit_half <- GPSNorm::normalize_spe_inla_pac(
    data_kidney_spe, 
    model_fun = GPSNorm::fit_inla_baseline_model,
    model_args = list(
        verbose = TRUE
    ),
    group_col = "group_bin", 
    cluster_aoi = TRUE, 
    cluster_args = list(
        k = 10, 
        target_per_slide = 100L, 
        verbose = TRUE
    )
)

kidney_fit_quart_test <- GPSNorm::normalize_spe_inla_pac(
    data_kidney_spe, 
    model_fun = GPSNorm::fit_inla_baseline_model,
    model_args = list(
        verbose = TRUE
    ),
    group_col = "group_bin", 
    cluster_aoi = TRUE, 
    cluster_args = list(
        k = 10, 
        target_per_slide = 50L, 
        verbose = TRUE
    ) 
)

kidney_fit_half_res <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_bayes(
    kidney_fit_half$spe, 
    kidney_fit_half$fit$fit
)

kidney_fit_quart_res <- GPSNorm::de_volcano_bayes(
    kidney_fit_quart_test$spe, 
    kidney_fit_quart_test$fit$fit
)


kidney_fit_full_res <- kidney_fit_bayes
kidney_fit_full_res$df <- kidney_fit_full_res$df |> arrange(gene)

kidney_fit_half_res$df <- kidney_fit_half_res$df |> arrange(gene)

kidney_fit_quart_res$df <- kidney_fit_quart_res$df |> arrange(gene)

kidney_half_bayes_rmse <- (
    sqrt(mean(
        kidney_fit_full_res$df$beta - 
        kidney_fit_half_res$df$beta
    )^2)
)

kidney_half_bayes_spearman <- (
    cor(
        kidney_fit_full_res$df$beta, 
        kidney_fit_half_res$df$beta, 
        method = "spearman"
    )
)

kidney_quart_bayes_rmse <- (
    sqrt(mean(
        kidney_fit_full_res$df$beta - 
        kidney_fit_quart_res$df$beta
    )^2)
)

kidney_quart_bayes_spearman <- (
    cor(
        kidney_fit_full_res$df$beta, 
        kidney_fit_quart_res$df$beta, 
        method = "spearman"
    )
)


top_k <- ceiling(0.1 * 203)

abs_ranked_genes <- kidney_fit_bayes$df |> 
    arrange(desc(abs(beta))) |> 
    pull(gene)

top_k_genes <- abs_ranked_genes[1:top_k]

kidney_half_top_k_spearman <- cor(
    kidney_fit_full_res$df |> 
        filter(gene %in% top_k_genes) |> 
        arrange(gene) |>
        pull(beta), 
    kidney_fit_half_res$df |> 
        filter(gene %in% top_k_genes) |> 
        arrange(gene) |>
        pull(beta), 
    method = "spearman"
)

kidney_quart_top_k_spearman <- cor(
    kidney_fit_full_res$df |> 
        filter(gene %in% top_k_genes) |> 
        arrange(gene) |>
        pull(beta), 
    kidney_fit_quart_res$df |> 
        filter(gene %in% top_k_genes) |> 
        arrange(gene) |>
        pull(beta), 
    method = "spearman"
)

top_prop <- 0.1
top_k <- ceiling(top_prop * nrow(kidney_fit_full_res$df))

top_k_genes <- kidney_fit_full_res$df |>
    mutate(beta_abs = abs(beta)) |>
    arrange(desc(beta_abs)) |>
    slice_head(n = top_k) |>
    pull(gene)

topk_spearman <- function(
    df_ref, df_cmp, top_genes, gene_col = "gene", beta_col = "beta"
) {
    ref <- df_ref |>
        select(gene = all_of(gene_col), beta_ref = all_of(beta_col)) |>
        distinct(gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

    cmp <- df_cmp |>
        select(gene = all_of(gene_col), beta_cmp = all_of(beta_col)) |>
        distinct(gene, .keep_all = TRUE)

    joined <- inner_join(ref, cmp, by = "gene") |>
        filter(gene %in% top_genes)

    k_target <- length(top_genes)
    k_used   <- nrow(joined)
    pct_missing <- 100 * (1 - k_used / k_target)

    list(
        spearman = cor(joined$beta_ref, joined$beta_cmp, method = "spearman"),
        k_target = k_target,
        k_used = k_used,
        pct_missing = pct_missing,
        joined = joined
    )
}

half_res <- topk_spearman(
    kidney_fit_full_res$df, kidney_fit_half_res$df, top_k_genes
)

quart_res <- topk_spearman(
    kidney_fit_full_res$df, kidney_fit_quart_res$df, top_k_genes
)

kidney_half_top_k_spearman  <- half_res$spearman
kidney_quart_top_k_spearman <- quart_res$spearman


kidney_aoi <- data.frame(
    AOIs = c(
        nrow(kidney_fit$prep_full$aoi), 
        nrow(kidney_fit_half$prep_fit$aoi), 
        nrow(kidney_fit_quart_test$prep_fit$aoi)
    ), 
    Runtime_sec = c(
        as.numeric(kidney_fit$fit$fit$cpu.used["Total"]), 
        as.numeric(kidney_fit_half$fit$fit$cpu.used["Total"]), 
        as.numeric(kidney_fit_quart_test$fit$fit$cpu.used["Total"])
    ),
    spearman_to_full_bayes = c(
        NA, kidney_half_bayes_spearman, kidney_quart_bayes_spearman
    ), 
    RMSE_to_full_bayes = c(
        NA, kidney_half_bayes_rmse, kidney_quart_bayes_rmse
    ), 
    top_k_spearman = c(
        NA, kidney_half_top_k_spearman, kidney_quart_top_k_spearman 
    ), 
    spearman_to_full_limma = c(
        NA, kidney_half_limma_spearman, kidney_quart_limma_spearman
    ), 
    RMSE_to_full_limma = c(
        NA, kidney_half_limma_rmse, kidney_quart_limma_rmse
    )
)
```
